overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in futuristic armor walking through a dimly lit industrial facility. The character traverses an elevated metal catwalk surrounded by machinery and pipes, then descends a staircase. The environment features cool blue-green artificial lighting and atmospheric haze typical of sci-fi horror games.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial catwalk with metal mesh walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated industrial catwalk surrounded by machinery and safety railings

entered.detail: yellow-painted metal grating walkway extending into the distance
yellow metal safety railing along the left edge of the walkway
yellow metal safety railing along the right edge of the walkway
wire mesh safety wall on the left side of the catwalk
wire mesh safety wall on the right side of the catwalk
large yellow crane beam running parallel overhead
large cylindrical industrial pipes visible through the right mesh wall
complex industrial machinery and structures visible in the background haze

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow elevated catwalk in a dimly lit industrial facility. Yellow safety railings and metal mesh walls line both sides of the metal grating floor, with large pipes and machinery visible through the mesh. The overhead yellow crane beam runs parallel to the path as the character moves steadily forward through the hazy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: metal staircase descending to lower industrial level

events.description: character reaches the end of the catwalk and turns right to descend the stairs

agents.ego_description: turning right at the walkway end and walking down the metal stairs toward the lower level

entered.detail: metal stairs with teal painted edges descending to a lower platform
large silver insulated pipes running horizontally at eye level
teal painted metal platform at the top of the staircase
industrial control panel or door frame structure on the left wall

segments.scene_description: Reaching the end of the catwalk, the character turns right and begins descending a metal staircase with teal-painted edges. Large horizontal pipes run along the right side while industrial structures fill the background. The overhead beam and main walkway disappear from view as the character moves downward to a lower level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial facility as the perspective shifts from a high elevated walkway to a lower level. It begins with the character walking steadily along a narrow metal catwalk, flanked by yellow safety railings and mesh walls that reveal large pipes and machinery. As the character moves forward through the hazy atmosphere, an overhead yellow crane beam runs parallel to the path. The scene then shifts as the character reaches the end of the walkway and turns right, beginning a descent down a metal staircase with teal-painted edges. The overhead beam and main path disappear from view as the camera moves downward, passing large horizontal pipes toward the industrial structures of the lower level.
